name: Champions League
description: UEFA Champions League — winners, legends, and historic nights

questions.q: Which club has won the most European Cup / UEFA Champions League titles in history?

source.notes: Real Madrid have won 15 European Cups/Champions League titles as of 2024.

questions.q: Lionel Messi spent most of his career playing Champions League football for which club?

source.notes: Won 4 UCL titles with Barcelona in 2006, 2009, 2011, 2015.

questions.q: Real Madrid play their home matches at which stadium?

source.notes: Named after club president Santiago Bernabéu; opened 1947.

questions.q: Manchester United won the Champions League in 1999 under which legendary Scottish manager?

source.notes: Part of United's historic Treble in 1998–99.

questions.q: Steven Gerrard played his entire Champions League career — including the 2005 Istanbul triumph — for which club?

source.notes: Scored the opening goal in the 2005 'Miracle of Istanbul' comeback.

questions.q: Liverpool manager Rafa Benítez lifted the Champions League in 2005 after beating which Italian club on penalties?

source.notes: Liverpool came back from 3-0 down at half-time in Istanbul.

questions.q: What is the name of the annual European club competition formerly known as the 'European Cup'?

source.notes: Rebranded as the UEFA Champions League from the 1992–93 season.

questions.q: In the 1999 Champions League Final, which Norwegian striker scored Manchester United's injury-time winning goal?

source.notes: Scored in the 93rd minute to beat Bayern Munich 2-1.

questions.q: What was the full-time score in the 2005 Istanbul Champions League Final before penalties?

source.notes: Liverpool fought back from 3-0 down at half-time; won 3-2 on penalties.

questions.q: Which goalkeeper made two penalty saves for Liverpool in the 2005 UCL Final shootout?

source.notes: Polish goalkeeper famous for his 'spaghetti legs' routine at the shootout.

questions.q: Which Cameroonian forward won back-to-back Champions Leagues with Barcelona (2009) and Inter Milan (2010)?

source.notes: Under Pep Guardiola in 2009 and José Mourinho in 2010.

questions.q: Ryan Giggs holds the record for most Champions League/European Cup appearances for which single club?

source.notes: Giggs also scored in 16 consecutive Champions League seasons.

questions.q: In 2012, Lionel Messi scored how many goals in a single Champions League knockout match against Bayer Leverkusen?

source.notes: March 7, 2012; round of 16 second leg, Barcelona won 7-1.

questions.q: Alfredo Di Stéfano, top scorer of the first European Cup era, played club football primarily for whom?

source.notes: Argentine/Spanish striker; won five consecutive European Cups with Real Madrid 1956–60.

questions.q: In the 2013 Champions League Final, Bayern Munich beat which fellow German club in the 'all-German' final?

source.notes: Won 2-1 at Wembley Stadium on May 25, 2013.

questions.q: Chelsea beat which German club on penalties at Allianz Arena to win the 2012 Champions League Final?

source.notes: Held in Munich, Bayern's own home ground.

questions.q: Which Dutch club won the Champions League in 1995 under coach Louis van Gaal?

source.notes: Ajax beat AC Milan 1-0; Patrick Kluivert scored the winner as a teenager.

questions.q: Which Italian club was beaten by Liverpool in both the 1984 European Cup Final and the 2005 Istanbul final — the same Italian club, different opponents?

source.notes: Liverpool beat Roma in 1984 (Rome) on penalties, and AC Milan in 2005 (Istanbul).

questions.q: Which English club won the European Cup in back-to-back years, 1979 and 1980, under Brian Clough?

source.notes: Beat Malmö in 1979 and Hamburg in 1980.

questions.q: Who was the first Englishman to win the Champions League while playing for a foreign club?

source.notes: Won with Real Madrid in 2000 and 2002.

questions.q: Which Manchester United captain missed the 1999 Champions League Final due to suspension?

source.notes: Keane and Paul Scholes both missed the final through suspension.

questions.q: In the 2014 Champions League Final, Real Madrid beat which city rival to win 'La Décima' (their 10th)?

source.notes: Won 4-1 in Lisbon after extra time; Sergio Ramos equalized in stoppage time.
